caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, black headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS" text and logos is seated in a recording studio. He rests his chin on his hand, wearing a gold watch on his wrist, while speaking into a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm. In the background, a white wall features a repeated logo with five gold stars and the word "HUSTLE." A blue sign above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the table, there is a black mug and equipment associated with a podcast or broadcast. Small logos are present in the bottom corners of the scene, including one that reads "TALK OUT". Across the frames, the man remains in the same position, subtly shifting his facial expression and head posture as he speaks, while the overall setting and equipment remain static.
